mapper.select: SELECT cm.category_no, cm.no, cm.title, cm.insert_date, c.name AS name FROM community cm, customer c WHERE cm.customer_no = c.no AND cm.status = 0 ORDER BY no DESC
SELECT * FROM community_category ORDER BY no

SELECT cm.no, cm.category_no, cm.title, cm.content, cm.status, c.name, cm.show_group, cm.insert_date, cm.update_date, cm.hit, cm.good, cm.bad FROM community cm, customer c WHERE cm.no = #{no} AND cm.customer_no = c.no
mapper.update: UPDATE community SET hit = hit+1 where no = #{no}
